rulings.Case Title: JSP BROADWAY, LLC VS. BENJAMIN ALFARO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recalll Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2011, line 2. Defendant Benjamin Alfaro's motion to vacate judgment and recall writ of possession. The court deems the motion to be a motion for reconsideration and the motion is continued to November 22 to be heard by Judge Quidachay. Defendant may apply for a stay of execution if necessary, and should post rent with the Court for the period of November 16-22 not later than November 15, 2011. (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. YOUNG WANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2011, line 4. Defendant Young Wang's motion to set aside default/default Judgment/Leave to Defend. Motion to set aside default, granted. Plaintiff was not in town when the 3 day notice was served and he expeditiously sought to respond as soon as he learned of the service. Default and default judgment are set aside. Writ of possession recalled. (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. KAYLA JOSEPHINE HILTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2011, line 3. Defendant Kayla Josephine Hilton's motion to set aside default/default Judgment/leave to Defend. Motion to set aside default, denied. It was unreasonable for the plaintiff to (1) rely on Catholic Charities for legal advise and (2) to ignore the summons and complaint. (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: LEM/RAY PROPERTIES J DE, LLC VS. ASHLEY MEECE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2011, line 1. Defendant Ashley Meece's demurrer, overrule, Complaint to be answered 5 days. (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES INC. VS. CHARLES MORTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2011, line 5. Charles Morton's Motion to set aside default/default Judgment/Leave to Defend, off calendar. (510/CEAK)
